name: HARD Summer 2025
venue: Hollywood Park Grounds at SoFi Stadium

scale_ref.description: APPROXIMATE — calibrate walkable boundary + stage positions in geojson.io against satellite

reference_pair.note: East-west span of festival grounds at center latitude

notes: Coordinates placed over Hollywood Park, wrapping AROUND SoFi Stadium.
SoFi Stadium is a large central obstacle — festival corridors run along its east and west sides.
HARD Stage is NW of stadium, Pink Stage is N/NE, Purple Stage is W.
HARDER Stage is S of stadium, Green Stage is SE near the Festival Entrance.
Pink Stage relocated near HARD for 2025 (sound complaint mitigation).
Festival Entrance is on the SE side along S Prairie Ave.
Calibrate against Google Earth Pro satellite imagery before final demo.
Gate capacity_pph values are estimates — tune to match arrival model.
